title: Brain v0 is Git-backed
summary: Brain v0 stores knowledge as Markdown, JSON, and YAML files under content/brain/. No database is used in v0. JSON registries are imported directly via resolveJsonModule, so no parser dependency is required.

title: Brain UI lives inside Minerva Console
summary: Brain routes live under app/(console)/brain/** and inherit the existing superadmin gate from app/(console)/layout.tsx. Brain reuses the Shell, PageHeader, and design tokens. The Brain feature module lives under features/brain/**.

title: Neon Postgres reserved for v1
summary: A Neon project exists but is intentionally not connected in v0. No DB deps, no migrations, no environment variables are added. Migration to Neon happens behind features/brain/lib/content.ts without changing UI code.

title: Brain must not use ENTRY or Seshat operational data
summary: features/brain/** must not import from features/entry/** and must not read ENTRY's or Seshat's Supabase projects. Brain stores no raw sensitive operational data from any product. Brain is not the CRM.
